mapper.select: select m.id, m.name, m.description, m.planned_date, m.actual_date, m.status, m.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name from milestone m left join sys_user u on u.id = m.owner_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.is_deleted = 0 order by case when m.planned_date is null then 1 else 0 end, m.planned_date asc, m.id desc

select m.id, m.name, m.description, m.planned_date, m.actual_date, m.status, m.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name from milestone m left join sys_user u on u.id = m.owner_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.id = #{id} and m.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, name, description, planned_date, actual_date, status, owner_id, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from milestone where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update milestone set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, planned_date = #{plannedDate}, actual_date = #{actualDate}, status = #{status}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
